title: De Ridder, Dercksen for Proteas' tour to India
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Cricket South Africa (CSA)...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Cricket South Africa (CSA) has named a 16-player squad for the Proteas Women’s tour to India, beginning with three ICC Women’s Championship One-Day Internationals (ODI) and a one-off Test match from 16 June to 1 July in Bengaluru and Chennai.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Cricket South Africa (CSA) has named a 16-player squad for the Proteas Women’s tour to India, beginning with three ICC Women’s Championship One-Day Internationals (ODI) and a one-off Test match from 16 June to 1 July in Bengaluru and Chennai."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The squad for the three-match T20 International (T20I) series, taking place from 5 to 9 July, will be confirmed during the tour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The experienced squad features the return of SA Emerging and Hollywoodbets Dolphins all-rounder Nondumiso Shangase, who rejoins the national team for the first time since the Bangladesh tour in December 2023.","html":"The experienced squad features the return of SA Emerging and Hollywoodbets Dolphins all-rounder Nondumiso Shangase, who rejoins the national team for the first time since the Bangladesh tour in December 2023."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Additionally, wicket keeper Mieke de Ridder from the Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers returns after missing the recent tour against Sri Lanka, due to a hand injury. Annerie Dercksen will be another player from the Garden Route Badgers who will join the tour.","html":"Additionally, wicket keeper Mieke de Ridder from the Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers returns after missing the recent tour against Sri Lanka, due to a hand injury. Annerie Dercksen will be another player from the Garden Route Badgers who will join the tour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In another significant comeback, top-order batter Tazmin Brits has been named in the squad as she nears full recovery from a knee surgery in mid-April. Brits will undergo a fitness test before the team departs, to determine the extent of her participation in the tour.","html":"In another significant comeback, top-order batter Tazmin Brits has been named in the squad as she nears full recovery from a knee surgery in mid-April. Brits will undergo a fitness test before the team departs, to determine the extent of her participation in the tour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mieke de Ridder.","html":"Mieke de Ridder."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Proteas Women interim head coach, Dillon du Preez, said: “Everyone's excited and looking forward to the tour to India. So far, preparation has been great. We had a big focus on options against spin and it was good to see the buy-in from the team.","html":"Proteas Women interim head coach, Dillon du Preez, said: “Everyone's excited and looking forward to the tour to India. So far, preparation has been great. We had a big focus on options against spin and it was good to see the buy-in from the team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We also have new management involved, so this will be a great opportunity for them to find their feet before we come back and start our preparation for the World Cup.\"","html":"\"We also have new management involved, so this will be a great opportunity for them to find their feet before we come back and start our preparation for the World Cup.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The key for us will be to assess the conditions as soon as possible, be calm under pressure and try to play key moments in the game better than the opposition. We all know a series against India in India will always be tough.\"","html":"“The key for us will be to assess the conditions as soon as possible, be calm under pressure and try to play key moments in the game better than the opposition. We all know a series against India in India will always be tough.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Proteas Women ODI and Test Squad:Laura Wolvaardt (captain) (Fidelity Titans), Anneke Bosch (Fidelity Titans), Tazmin Brits (DP World LIons), Nadine de Klerk (World Sports Betting Western Province), Annerie Dercksen (Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers), Mieke de Ridder (Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers), Sinalo Jafta (DP World Lions), Marizanne Kapp (World Sports Betting Western Province), Ayabonga Khaka (DP World Lions) (ODI Squad Only), Masabata Klaas (Fidelity Titans), Sune´ Luus (Fidelity Titans), Eliz-Mari Marx (Fidelity Titans), Nonkululeko Mlaba (Hollywoodbets Dolphins), Tumi Sekhukhune (DP World Lions), Nondumiso Shangase (Hollywoodbets Dolphins) and ?Delmi Tucker (World Sports Betting Western Province).","html":"The Proteas Women ODI and Test Squad:
Laura Wolvaardt (captain) (Fidelity Titans), Anneke Bosch (Fidelity Titans), Tazmin Brits (DP World LIons), Nadine de Klerk (World Sports Betting Western Province), Annerie Dercksen (Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers), Mieke de Ridder (Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers), Sinalo Jafta (DP World Lions), Marizanne Kapp (World Sports Betting Western Province), Ayabonga Khaka (DP World Lions) (ODI Squad Only), Masabata Klaas (Fidelity Titans), Sune´ Luus (Fidelity Titans), Eliz-Mari Marx (Fidelity Titans), Nonkululeko Mlaba (Hollywoodbets Dolphins), Tumi Sekhukhune (DP World Lions), Nondumiso Shangase (Hollywoodbets Dolphins) and ?Delmi Tucker (World Sports Betting Western Province)."}]
